title: The Vested and Non-Resident Property (Administration) (Repeal) Ordinance, 1976
title_en: The Vested and Non-Resident Property (Administration) (Repeal) Ordinance, 1976
description: An Ordinance to repeal the Vested and Non-Resident Property (Administration) Act, 1974. WHEREAS it is expedient to repeal the Vested and Non-Resident Property (Administration) Act, 1974 (XLVI of 1974), for the purpose hereinafter appearing; NOW, THEREFORE, in pursuance of the proclamations of the 20thAugust, 1975, and the 8th November, 1975, and in exercise of all powers enabling him in that behalf, the President ...

provisions.title: 1. [Repealed].
provisions.content: 1. This Ordinance may be called the Vested and Non- Resident Property (Administration) (Repeal) Ordinance, 1976.

provisions.title: 2. [Repealed]
provisions.content: 2. The Vested and Non-Resident Property (Administration) Act, 1974 (XLVI of 1974), is hereby repealed.
